NEW POSTER: ANCIENT GIANTS! Big heads, bigger secrets. These ancient faces know something.

Stay sharp, Villains!

title: Screwdom
notes:
New Event: Puzzle Pieces. Complete levels and collect puzzle pieces to earn special rewards.
New Seasonal: Summer Pass. Enjoy a sunny adventure packed with exclusive rewards.
Bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Mystery Town: Merge Games
notes: More exciting events will be launched one after another, stay tuned！

title: Carnival Tycoon: Coin Games
notes: Get ready for an enhanced experience with our latest update! Enjoy new features and improvements with this release. Update now and dive into the excitement!

title: Merge Mansion: Puzzles & Story
notes:
Summer has arrived in Hopewell Bay, and there's plenty to look forward to in our latest update!

• Maddie and her friends are gearing up for an exciting soccer watch party.
• Discover and restore the Hallway of Curiosities, our newest area filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered.
• Enjoy a lineup of fun seasonal events and brand-new Season Passes packed with rewards.
• We've also made a variety of improvements and fixes to keep your experience running smoothly.

See you in Hopewell Bay!

title: Zooba: Zoo Battle Royale Games
notes:
Improved match performance and reduced network usage for a smoother gameplay experience.
Fixed a bug where Tai Lung's passive ability could trigger more times than intended during a match.
Fixed an issue where players on some foldable devices could get stuck in the spectator view and were unable to leave a match.
General bug fixes and stability improvements.
